applicability_notes: torch_pattern_source: call_site: attn_output = ttnn.transpose(attn_output, 1, 2); attn_output = ttnn.reshape(attn_output, (batch, tgt_len, embed_dim))  # [B,H,S,D] -> [B,S,H*D] head merge before output projection; ttnn_replacement: x = ttnn.transpose(x, 1, 2, memory_config={TRANSPOSE_MEMCFG}); x = ttnn.reshape(x, ({BATCH}, {SEQ}, {EMBED_DIM}), memory_config={RESHAPE_MEMCFG})
